case_title: AIDA SARAVIA VS. KURT FORRY et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-08-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SARAVIA, AIDA AS TO DEFENDANT FORRY, KURT DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-01-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-30-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-17-2012

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SARAVIA, AIDA SERVED MAR-17-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FORRY, KURT
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-01-2012 CONTINUED TO OCT-03-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-08-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE NOV-14-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
